payload.answer: The new statement appears to update the project status of the same Brain Slack agent from planned/open to MVP implemented. This is a potential project state transition rather than a direct contradiction.
citations: Existing: The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open
New: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented

entity_resolution.reason: The existing and new facts both refer to the Brain Slack agent; the new fact narrows scope to the MVP but appears to concern the same project.

evidence.existing_fact: The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open
evidence.new_fact: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented
evidence.reason: Both facts refer to the Brain Slack agent. The existing fact describes a planned/open state, while the new fact indicates the MVP has been implemented, suggesting a project status update.
